diagnostic: gradient localization — WHERE does the routed-mask vs whole training signal first diverge?
authorized: 2026-07-12 by Jordan ('yes' to the gradient-diff diagnostic)
method: 3 processes, SAME seed 42 (=> identical LoRA init, batch order, dropout masks, frozen router/experts; the ONLY difference is staging or atomic order): (A) whole_layer, (B) routed+mask, (C) routed+mask AGAIN. Each runs 3 optimizer steps with GRAD_DUMP=1 -> per-trainable-param grad L2+absmax at float64. Subject: Qwen3-30B seq256 (E=128, rf~0.69 real fill — OLMoE is dose-incapable so NOT usable here). No optimizer LR matters for step-0 grads; steps 1-2 show whether divergence is step-0 or accretes.

quantities.d_WR: max over params of |gradnorm_A - gradnorm_B| at step 0 (whole vs routed, systematic candidate)
quantities.d_RR: max over params of |gradnorm_B - gradnorm_C| at step 0 (routed self-reproducibility = the index_add_ atomic-noise floor at the gradient level)
quantities.loss_hp: training loss to full float precision per arm (is the 'bit-identical' forward real at f32 or only at 3-decimal eval?)

frozen_interpretation.ATOMIC: if d_WR ~ d_RR (whole-vs-routed grad difference is within routed's OWN run-to-run atomic floor) -> the residual is index_add_ accumulation nondeterminism (routed loops fewer experts -> systematically different rounding), NOT a logic bug. Consequence: unfixable without deterministic scatter; whole_layer stays the training path; routed forward/decode only. Corroboration to check: does it match the seq512 convexity / A4 non-attenuation? Atomic noise would NOT be coherent, so if ATOMIC fires it CONTRADICTS the coherence evidence -> flag the tension.
frozen_interpretation.BACKWARD_PATH: if d_WR >> d_RR (>= 10x) -> a real routed-vs-whole-sensitive backward path. Localize: report the LAYER/param with the largest d_WR and whether it is concentrated (few layers) or diffuse (propagation). This is the actionable finding -> design a targeted fix there.
frozen_interpretation.FORWARD: if loss_hp differs between A and B at f32 despite the 3-decimal eval match -> the forward is NOT truly identical; the divergence seeds in the forward and I diff activations next.

cost: ~$0.7, 3 short arms (3 steps each), PRO 6000 or 3090. DECISIVE about mechanism class; replaces guessing with measurement.
note: This is a diagnostic, not a verdict — but the interpretation branches are pre-committed so the result cannot be rationalized after the fact.
